summary:
The patient presents with symptoms consistent with Canavan’s disease, characterized by macrocephaly and hereditary leukodystrophy affecting myelin development; none of the alternative diseases listed exhibit this specific symptomatology. Hence,
\[ \boxed{\text{Canavan's Disease}} \] Summary:

Macrocephaly is primarily associated with Canavan's disease, a hereditary leukodystrophy that affects myelin formation. Other discussed disorders do not present with this feature. 

Hence,
\[ \boxed{\text{Canavan's Disease}} \]
